name: WFBE_NEURODEF_MIXEDPOS_WEST
notes: MIXED POST (LIGHT, 2 AI) — WEST. An all-threat outpost covering the three lanes with INTERLOCKING arcs: the .50 (anti-infantry) faces front-left and the TOW (anti-armour) faces front-right, their arcs crossing forward of the position so an attacker in the centre is engaged by both — classic mutual support. A Stinger tucked at the rear covers the air lane AND its own firers' blind side (facing back, +180). Each weapon sits in a sandbag ring. Ammo central. Short bag walls on the flanks. Forward wire canalizes dismounts into the crossfire; the rear stays open as the covered fallback / entrance. Nothing is placed over a weapon's firing line.

objs.role: .50 cal — anti-infantry, arc front-left (crosses TOW's arc)
TOW — anti-armour, arc front-right (crosses MG's arc)
Stinger — air lane + covers the firers' blind side
forward wire — canalizes dismounts into the crossfire
